files.content:
# Northstar brief

Deliver resumable batch export with integrity verification for large workspaces. Non-goals: interactive preview in the first release.

evals.expected_output: The assistant ingests the brief, aligns phases to its constraints, and materialises a dated specs folder with a coordination file plus numbered subtasks that reference those requirements.

evals.prompt: /z-spec-create "Add resilient offline queueing to the ingestion worker"
assertions: After `/z-spec-create`, the spawned generator payload MUST preserve the provided quoted description as the scope input rather than substituting an unrelated initiative title before discovery completes.

After `/z-spec-create`, created markdown filenames under the dated directory MUST embed a slug derived from the ingestion worker scope together with the same calendar date stamp used in the parent folder name.

primitive_analysis.summary: These cases cover the Spec System precondition abort, all three argument shapes from the usage block, the dated spec tree and status scaffolding the command promises, and the post-approval judge hand-off with Ready for Review status.
fixture_justifications: Initialises Spec System so the command proceeds past the precondition in minimal workspaces.

evals.expected_output: The assistant forwards the quoted initiative text into the generator, derives a slug and date-structured folder, and writes matching coordination and subtask files that stay anchored to that scope.

assertions: Before calling the spec complete, the transcript MUST record `pnpm run spec-status-roundtrip -- scaffold` (or a direct invocation producing the same paired artifacts) creating matching `.status.md` and `.status.yml` files under the dated `status/` directory for each subtask.
After the approval follow-up, the manifest MUST note a `zoto-spec-judge` engagement and the spec status MUST read Ready for Review in the written status artifacts.

primitive_analysis.summary: These cases cover the Spec System precondition abort, all three argument shapes from the usage block, the dated spec tree and status scaffolding the command promises, and the post-approval judge hand-off with Ready for Review status.
fixture_justifications: Provides the config file the command requires so later steps can execute end-to-end in the sandbox.

evals.expected_output: The assistant finishes drafting, runs the status round-trip scaffolder, presents a review summary, honours approval, brings in the judge agent, and marks the bundle Ready for Review.
follow_ups: Approve the printed spec summary and run the quality gate now.
